docs/agent-manager-technical-report.md.note: 已补充“用户感知收益不足：当前复杂度高于可见优势”章节，用于明确当前系统的基础设施投入与产品收益落差。
技术汇报文档基于当前实现核对完成：当前系统应表述为主控型多 Agent Session Manager，而非自发式多 Agent 协同编排系统；后续若实现跨 Agent handoff/orchestrator，需要同步更新该文档。

src/core/nova/agent-manager/AgentTeamCoo.note: ⚠️ launchWave() 对 parallel/adaptive 策略使用 Promise.allSettled 并发 launch。prompt context snapshot 必须在并发 launch 之前完成（wave 级快照）。launchMember() 是抽取出的单成员 launch 方法，不包含 try/catch（由调用方根据串行/并行策略决定错误处理）。shouldPauseForWaveApproval 新增了 detectOwnershipOverlap 条件。

⚠️ launchWave() now snapshots prompt context once per wave before launching members. If future true parallel launch is added, preserve this wave-level snapshot behavior or later launches may miss unread handoffs consumed by earlier members in the same wave.

⚠️ Current Agent Team is only a lightweight orchestration skeleton: executeWave() marks members done and emits handoff/session_completed immediately after launchSession returns sessionId, without waiting for actual worker completion. Blackboard/handoff currently act as state/UI artifacts, not a real shared-memory collaboration loop.

webview-ui/src/nova/agent-manager/compon.note: ⚠️ TeamControlPlane 现已支持 collapsed/expanded 两种布局状态。收起态仅保留 toggle 与紧凑状态徽标；展开态支持 cancelTeamRun、cancelTeamMember、selectSession。后续调整 UI 时必须保留这些 postMessage 行为与 aria-label 文案（collapse/expand/viewSession/cancelRun/cancelMember），否则现有测试会失效。

⚠️ TeamControlPlane now relies on both status and consumedAt for handoff/blackboard consume display: handoff is considered consumed when status === 'consumed' OR consumedAt exists; blackboard entries always render a consumed/pending pill, so future UI changes must preserve this distinction.

packages/core-schemas/src/agent-manager/.note: ⚠️ Sprint 1 intentionally extends TeamBlackboardEntry with optional category and TeamApprovalRequest with optional askType/requestKey instead of changing existing kind/status enums; keep backward compatibility with current teamRun/teamRunEvent payloads and old run.json snapshots.

webview-ui/src/nova/agent-manager/state/.note: ⚠️ teamRun normalize must remain backward-compatible: blackboard.category and approval.askType/requestKey are optional additions. Do not replace existing kind-based validation; preserve old payload acceptance while preferring category for new UI grouping.

src/core/nova/agent-manager/RuntimeProce.note: ⚠️ pendingProcess 已改为 pendingProcesses: Map<number, PendingProcessInfo>（以 proc.pid 为 key）。所有新代码必须通过 getPendingForProcess(proc) 或 Map 操作访问 pending 状态，绝不能直接访问旧的 pendingProcess 属性。cancelPendingSession 支持可选 desiredSessionId 参数。

webview-ui/src/nova/agent-manager/compon.note: ⚠️ SessionSidebar 使用 GroupedSessionList 按 teamRunId 分组聚合。session 列表渲染逻辑依赖 GroupedSessionList 组件中的 useMemo 分组。如果重构列表渲染，必须保留按 teamRunId 的分组逻辑和 team group header，否则 team session 的可视化分组体验会退化。
⚠️ SessionSidebar 已消费 teamRunId/roleType 并显示 team 图标与 role badge。后续若重构 session item，必须保留 team session 的可视区分，否则 Team 调试体验会再次退化。

src/core/prompts/system.ts.note: ⚠️ getAgentTeamGuidanceSection() 现在生成 MANDATORY Ownership Constraints 和 ENFORCED File Separation Policy 段落。修改时必须保留 ownershipBlock 和 fileSeparationBlock 两个条件块，否则 ownership 约束会退化为建议性文本。
